name: Non-Cash Remittance Tax Exclusion

eligibility.description: Applies to senders of remittance transfers who use electronic funding methods rather than physical cash or similar instruments.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoid the 1% remittance transfer tax by funding transfers via bank account withdrawal, debit card, or credit card instead of using cash or money orders.
